forgotPasswordForm.title: Forgot password
forgotPasswordForm.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPasswordForm.successMessage: If this email exists in our system, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.

verifyEmailHandler.successDescription: Your email address has been verified. Your account is active, you can sign in.
verifyEmailHandler.errorDescription: This verification link is no longer valid. You can request a new link or sign in if your account is already activated.

resendVerificationForm.title: Resend verification link
resendVerificationForm.description: Enter your email address to receive a new verification link.
resendVerificationForm.toastSuccess: If this account exists, a new verification link has been sent.
resendVerificationForm.successMessage: If this email exists in our system, a new verification link has been sent. Check your inbox and spam folder.

accountConsentForm.title: Complete your account
accountConsentForm.emailNotifications: I would like to receive important email notifications (messages, invitations, followers).

checkEmailMessage.title: Check your inbox
checkEmailMessage.description: We sent you an email with a link to verify your address and activate your account. The link is valid for 15 minutes.
checkEmailMessage.checkSpam: If you don't see the email, check your spam or junk folder.

useAuth.googleMergedAccount: We detected an existing unverified email account and automatically linked it to your Google account.
useAuth.googleLoginError: An error occurred with Google sign-in

usePasswordReset.requestSuccess: If this email exists in our system, a reset link has been sent.
usePasswordReset.resetSuccess: Your password has been reset successfully.
